title: Clicker Zombies
description: Have you ever wanted Clickers from The Last Of Us in Minecraft? Well, I did...so here it is!
body:
I wanted to add clickers from the last of us into Minecraft and so I did. This resource pack is complete with a new model for the zombie as well as full replacement of sounds directly from the games and show. mods are not required as the regular texture looks fine but with entity model features and entity texture features you get the full experience.

Version two will add a new and improved Clicker model, it will change the name of zombie in the game to Clicker, and it will also change the husk into a Stalker.
